dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Welcome back! Here is a quick summary of your ecosystem.
dashboard.no_assigned_tasks: There are no tasks assigned to you at the moment.

sections.tasks_description: Active labeling jobs assigned to you.

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.empty_list: No datasets found matching the criteria.
datasets.description: Manage versioned data collections and track progress.

apikeys_detail.title: Integration API Keys
apikeys_detail.description: Manage secret keys to access your datasets securely from external applications or SDKs.
apikeys_detail.generate_desc: Give your key a descriptive name to remember where it is used.
apikeys_detail.placeholder: e.g., Python SDK Production, Jenkins CI
apikeys_detail.security_notice: Do not share your API keys in public repositories or client-side code. Anyone with this key can modify your dataset configurations.
apikeys_detail.list_desc: Tokens currently authorized to make requests under this account.
apikeys_detail.external_provider_desc: Connect your own OpenAI API key to run models and send commands within the synthetic data studio.
apikeys_detail.external_privacy_notice: Privacy Guarantee: Your key is strictly never saved to the remote database (backend). It is stored only in this browser's local storage and routed directly to the AI engine.
apikeys_detail.external_success_msg: Key verified successfully and connected to the browser session. Synthetic Data Studio is active!

messages.create_failed: An error occurred while generating the key.
messages.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This action cannot be undone.
messages.revoked_success: API key has been permanently revoked.
messages.revoke_failed: An API error occurred while revoking the key.
messages.external_success_toast: External API key securely connected to your browser session!
messages.key_cleared: External key cleared from browser storage.

project_general.delete_warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
project_general.placeholder_desc: Describe the purpose of this dataset...

taxonomy.title: Project Taxonomy
taxonomy.description: Manage object classes and the relations between them.
taxonomy.prompt_msg: Enter new attribute name (e.g., color, truncation):

assets.upload_desc: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse. Supports JPG, PNG, MP4.

export.title: Export Dataset
export.description: Download your annotations in industry-standard formats.
export.ready_desc: This process will package all annotated assets into a {{format}} file.
